task_completion.description: Verify the BFI25 dataset is loaded into Jamovi.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jamovi application window is open and displays the BFI25 dataset in the spreadsheet view, with columns like A1, A2, etc., visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the Exploratory Factor Analysis (EFA) panel is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Exploratory Factor Analysis' settings panel is visible on the left side of the Jamovi interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct 25 variables are selected for the analysis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the EFA settings panel, the 25 personality variables (A1-A5, C1-C5, E1-E5, N1-N5, O1-O5) are listed in the 'Variables' box. 'gender' and 'age' must NOT be in this box.

task_completion.description: Verify the extraction, rotation, and factor count settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the EFA settings panel, 'Minimum residuals' is selected under Extraction, 'Oblimin' is selected under Rotation, and 'Fixed number' is selected under Number of Factors with the value set to 5.

task_completion.description: Verify factor summary and factor correlations are included.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the EFA settings panel, the checkboxes for 'Factor summary' and 'Factor correlations' are checked, OR the corresponding tables are visible in the results pane on the right.

task_completion.description: Verify the results are saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog shows the file being saved as 'BFI25_EFA.omv' in the '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/' directory, or the main Jamovi window title bar displays 'BFI25_EFA.omv'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Jamovi GUI to perform the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Jamovi graphical interface (menus, dialogs, settings panels) rather than terminal commands or R/Python scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the results pane shows actual computed tables.
integrity.visual_evidence: The right-hand results pane in Jamovi should display properly formatted tables for Factor Loadings, Factor Summary, and Factor Correlations, indicating the software actually ran the analysis.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the expected output into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application in use must clearly be Jamovi (identifiable by its distinct spreadsheet/results split view and analysis ribbons), not a text editor or word processor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file is /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/BFI25_EFA.omv. The dataset is /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/BFI25.csv. The EFA must include exactly 25 variables. The configuration must use exactly 5 factors and 'oblimin' rotation.
